reasoning: The 3x3 tile array balances resource availability and control distribution. Add and Mul units are spread across tiles to exploit parallelism in the FIR kernel. Vectorization is set to 'all' to maximize throughput of Add/Mul operations. Memory units (Ld/St) are placed near edges for efficient memory access. A central tile (tile6) includes control FUs (Cmp, Phi, Br) for reduced control path latency. Configuration memory is sufficient for loop unrolling and control flow handling. Scratchpad size is moderate to support data reuse without over-provisioning for power efficiency.
